skipped_smoke_tests.name: Add CitationRenderer (Priority 350) and Register in DI
skipped_smoke_tests.description: Launch app, send a message that produces citations — verify inline [1] markers render as clickable superscript, verify footnote definitions render with index and linked title.

skipped_smoke_tests.name: Add WebView2 NuGet + ArtifactsWebView2Host Control
skipped_smoke_tests.description: Launch app, verify artifacts panel renders in right panel. Verify theme toggle updates WebView2 content.

skipped_smoke_tests.name: Implement Per-Chat Toolbar Toggles (Tools, Skills, Memory)
skipped_smoke_tests.description: Launch app, open a chat, verify Tools/Skills/Memory toggles appear in toolbar. Toggle tools off → verify they are removed from system prompt (observable via debug log).

skipped_smoke_tests.name: Update Knowledge Files
skipped_smoke_tests.description: Open each of the 4 knowledge files and verify content reflects the new architecture: 10-tool surface, skills subsystem, WebView2 artifacts panel, MemoryEntry entity. Verify file size > 0 and content is meaningful.
